question_intent: Calculate the total amount of charges made by members from the South American region in 1999-07, excluding charges from the 'Travel' category

plan.question_intent: Calculate the total amount of charges made by members from the South American region in 1999-07, excluding charges from the 'Travel' category
plan.detail_query: SELECT c.charge_no, m.member_no, m.lastname, m.firstname, c.charge_dt, c.charge_amt, cat.category_desc FROM {{leaf_1}} AS leaf_1 JOIN charge AS c ON leaf_1.charge_no = c.charge_no JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM c.charge_dt) = 1999 AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM c.charge_dt) = 7 AND cat.category_desc != 'Travel'

blocks.name: leaf_1
join_clauses: JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
blocks.notes: This block returns the charge numbers and region numbers for charges made by members from the South American region in July 1999

blocks.name: leaf_2
join_clauses: JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
blocks.notes: This block returns the charge numbers and amounts for charges not in the 'Travel' category

blocks.name: root
join_clauses: JOIN {{leaf_2}} AS leaf_2 ON leaf_1.charge_no = leaf_2.charge_no
blocks.notes: This block calculates the total amount of charges made by members from the South American region in July 1999, excluding charges from the 'Travel' category

build_logs.notes: This block returns the charge numbers and region numbers for charges made by members from the South American region in July 1999

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM charge AS c
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
WHERE (r.region_name = 'South American')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
WHERE (r.region_name = 'South American') AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM c.charge_dt) = 1999)
LIMIT 5

FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no

build_logs.notes: This block returns the charge numbers and amounts for charges not in the 'Travel' category

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM charge AS c
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM charge AS c
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM charge AS c
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE (cat.category_desc != 'Travel')
LIMIT 5

SELECT c.charge_no, c.charge_amt
FROM charge AS c
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE (cat.category_desc != 'Travel')

build_logs.notes: This block calculates the total amount of charges made by members from the South American region in July 1999, excluding charges from the 'Travel' category

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT c.charge_no, m.region_no
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
WHERE (r.region_name = 'South American')) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN {{leaf_2}} AS leaf_2 ON leaf_1.charge_no = leaf_2.charge_no
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT c.charge_no, m.region_no
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
WHERE (r.region_name = 'South American')) AS leaf_1
JOIN (SELECT c.charge_no, c.charge_amt
FROM charge AS c
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE (cat.category_desc != 'Travel')) AS leaf_2 ON leaf_1.charge_no = leaf_2.charge_no
LIMIT 5

SELECT SUM(leaf_2.charge_amt)
FROM (SELECT c.charge_no, m.region_no
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
WHERE (r.region_name = 'South American')) AS leaf_1
JOIN (SELECT c.charge_no, c.charge_amt
FROM charge AS c
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE (cat.category_desc != 'Travel')) AS leaf_2 ON leaf_1.charge_no = leaf_2.charge_no

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_2.charge_amt)
FROM (SELECT leaf_1.region_name, leaf_1.charge_no, leaf_1.charge_amt, leaf_1.payment_no, leaf_1.payment_amt
FROM (SELECT r.region_name, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt, p.payment_no, p.payment_amt
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN payment AS p ON m.member_no = p.member_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE (cat.category_desc != 'Travel')
GROUP BY r.region_name, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt, p.payment_no, p.payment_amt) AS leaf_1
WHERE (leaf_1.payment_amt > (SELECT AVG(payment_amt) FROM payment))
GROUP BY leaf_1.region_name, leaf_1.charge_no, leaf_1.charge_amt, leaf_1.payment_no, leaf_1.payment_amt) AS leaf_2

SELECT SUM(leaf_1.payment_amt)
FROM (SELECT p.payment_no, p.payment_dt, p.payment_amt, r.region_name
FROM payment AS p
JOIN member AS m ON p.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN charge AS c ON p.member_no = c.member_no
GROUP BY p.payment_no, p.payment_dt, p.payment_amt, r.region_name
HAVING (AVG(c.charge_amt) > 100)) AS leaf_1

question: What is the total charge amount for charges that belong to members in the South American region and are not in the Travel category?
